title: AGC Module Output Schema
description: Parity contract for Application Gateway for Containers base module outputs. Both Terraform and Bicep modules must expose these keys with matching types.

alb_id.description: Azure resource ID of the Application Gateway for Containers (trafficController)

alb_name.description: Name of the Application Gateway for Containers resource

frontend_id.description: Azure resource ID of the AGC frontend

frontend_fqdn.description: Fully qualified domain name of the AGC frontend

association_id.description: Azure resource ID of the subnet association to the trafficController
